controllerEvidence.notes: Experimental single-system fan evidence only. Restart qualification remains incomplete.

controllerEvidence.exactDeviceId: ASUS ROG Strix X570-E Gaming / NCT6798D
controllerEvidence.notes: Experimental reference evidence only. A UAC-staged 0.4.0-alpha completed one Fan #1 60% two-second identification pulse with successful Prepare, Apply, Verify, and ResetToDefault; paired RPM was 1478.6 after reset. A later bounded 100%-to-0% calibration completed with stable samples, 1959.36 RPM maximum, and successful prior-policy rollback. The tach remained about 546 RPM at the requested 0% command; no stop, restart duty, or repeated restart evidence exists. The CASE_FAN_1 alias is a persisted software label, not physical-header proof. No general write claim follows.

notes: This unsigned reference record intentionally does not count toward the 1.0 signed-system matrix.
